metadata.description: UltraMemory plugins for Claude Code — recall-first memory, token economics, and the harness.

plugins.name: ultramemory-kit
plugins.description: UltraMemory Agent Kit (Tier 3) — Turbo Token Saver (recall-first hook + client cache) + the harness (grounding / checklist-bound execution skills, subagents, Stop gate) + optional MCP setup (Context7 keyless, Exa BYO) and our Playwright Human Vision Control skill. Bring your own UltraMemory key.
